title: Generated CLI Adapter Status Check Closeout

issue_classifications.title: [Workspace]: Make generated CLI adapter status a non-regression check
issue_classifications.evidence: scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py now reports generated command adapter status by program/output path, generated command surfaces, source contract, freshness, direct-edit detection, regeneration command, and edit routes.

findings.title: [Workspace]: Make generated CLI adapter status a non-regression check
findings.evidence: tests/test_contract_tooling.py covers _generated_command_adapter_statuses for both agentic-workspace and agentic-planning-bootstrap outputs; check output distinguishes command/interface contract edits from runtime primitive edits.
findings.notes: This directly addresses the #371 dogfooding friction where root and package generated status had to be reconciled together.

validation_commands: uv run ruff check src tests
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
